caption: A person's hands are shown opening a yellow box sitting inside a white tray. In the background, a man wearing a black t-shirt is seated in front of a computer setup. The setting includes various stacks of cards and equipment. On-screen text features a logo that reads "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM". As the sequence progresses, the person's hands lift the lid of the yellow box and pull out a shiny trading card. The man in the background remains seated and watches the action. The scene shifts from the closed box to the moment a card is revealed and lifted out of the packaging, while the overall environment of the room and the displayed logos remain constant.
